title: Intermediate transfer member, image forming apparatus, and production device for polymer mixture
abstract: An intermediate transfer member including a base layer, wherein the base layer contains a thermoplastic resin and an electroconductive filler dispersed in the thermoplastic resin, and wherein the base layer has a volume resistivity of 1Ã106 to 1Ã1013 Î©Â·cm, and the base layer has an electroconductive path index of 0.20 or less.
claims: 1. An intermediate transfer member comprising a base layer, the base layer containing a thermoplastic resin and an electroconductive filler dispersed in the thermoplastic resin, the base layer having a volume resistivity of 1×10 6 to 1×10 13 Ω·cm, and having an electroconductive path index of 0.20 or less.
